docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT BUN LOVE LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUN LOVE LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $24,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
